description:
Apply four xcodebuild improvements to scripts/reloads.sh (staging build script) on M-series Macs:

1. Skip x86_64 by default. Add ARCHS=arm64 ONLY_ACTIVE_ARCH=YES; --universal opt-out flag. Production release.yml stays universal.

2. Stable derived-data path per branch family. release/* tags share /tmp/c11-staging-release/; c11-* share /tmp/c11-staging-c11/; default fallback otherwise. Add HEAD sanity check + --clean flag (current per-tag dir behavior = always clean).

3. (Item 3 from spec was deliberately dropped — operator chose to skip package/macro validation flags.)

4. COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO for staging.

5. SWIFT_COMPILATION_MODE=incremental for staging; --wmo (or --release-mode) opt-out for the rare staging build that needs full WMO parity (e.g. last build before tag push, to catch WMO-only regressions like 0.47.0 New Workspace dialog).

Acceptance criteria:
- No-flag build: arm64-only, incremental, no index store, shared derived-data dir.
- --universal: universal binary still produced.
- --clean: wipes derived-data dir before build.
- --wmo: switches to wholemodule.
- Resulting c11 STAGING app launches and basics (window, sidebar, terminal pane) work.
- release.yml + nightly.yml untouched.

Expected headline: cold staging build ~6-10min → ~3-5min; warm rebuild ~6min → <60s.
title: Staging build perf: arm64-only, shared derived-data, no index store, incremental swift
